## Aegis - Pull Request

### Description
<!-- Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. -->
<!-- Explain how these changes fit into the security-first architecture of the Aegis API. -->

### Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Security Enhancement

### Security Checklist
- [ ] I have verified that no sensitive keys or secrets are hardcoded.
- [ ] My code follows the Aegis API security guidelines.
- [ ] The changes have been tested against the Arc Testnet.
- [ ] My code passes all existing tests (`npm test`).
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.

### Related Issue
